summary: The source permits only n from 1 through 8 and the optimal implementation is the complete eight-value residue table, leaving no unbounded workload for runtime scaling.

workload_bound.source_constraint: n is an integer from 1 through 8

replacement_checks.evidence: The optimal lookup reads one entry from the exhaustive eight-result table.
The ordinary case suite contains and verifies every legal value of n from 1 through 8.
